greetings.cold: Mr. Gibbons. I'm on a case. It's confidential.
greetings.neutral: Mr. Gibbons! Any crimes today? Asking for my notebook.
greetings.warm: GARY! Okay so I have THREE leads and one of them is DEFINITELY a crime.

etiquette.note: Junior detective. Notebook labeled CRIMES?. Trades secrets for secrets only.
